effective_labels.description: Labels applied to the cluster after considering inheritance and overrides

endpoint.description: Public IP address for accessing the Kubernetes API server

id.description: Unique identifier for the Kubernetes cluster resource

terraform_labels.description: Labels managed and applied by Terraform to the cluster
